title: Seventeen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta July 15
summary: On July 15, YKHC reports seventeen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 14, 2022
summary: July 14, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a slightly higher rate of 6.18% from the level on 07/07/2022 of 9.105 M km 2 to 8.542 M km 2 for this week.
